title: Best Sightseeing Pair
hints: Rewrite the score as (values[i] + i) + (values[j] - j) to separate terms depending on i and j.
As you iterate j from left to right, you need the maximum of (values[i] + i) for all i < j.
Maintain a running maximum of (values[i] + i) while iterating j, updating the answer at each step.
